integrity.description: Agent used the Gretl GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: The Gretl application GUI must be visible in the screenshots, showing interaction with the dataset menus or dialogs, rather than just terminal commands executing background scripts.

integrity.description: The Lorenz curve was genuinely generated within Gretl
integrity.visual_evidence: The Lorenz curve plot should appear in a Gretl-styled graph window or be saved directly from Gretl's interface, not downloaded from a web browser or copied from an external source.

integrity.description: Recorded values match the calculated output
